d8p1:Question.d8p1:Name: IsSanctioned
d8p1:Question.d8p1:Title: Is the entity currently subject to sanctions?

d8p1:Question.d8p1:Name: IsEntityPEP
d8p1:Question.d8p1:Title: Is the entity or any key principal a Politically Exposed Person (PEP)?

d8p1:Question.d8p1:Name: IsUBOPEP
d8p1:Question.d8p1:Title: Is any beneficial owner a PEP?

d8p1:Question.d8p1:Name: ScreeningDate
d8p1:Question.d8p1:Title: Date of most recent sanctions/PEP screening

d8p1:Question.d8p1:Name: RiskFactors
d8p1:Question.d8p1:Title: Risk Factors Identified (select all that apply)

d8p1:Question.d8p1:Name: SOFDocumented
d8p1:Question.d8p1:Title: Has supporting documentation been obtained and verified?

d8p1:Question.d8p1:Name: UBOVerified
d8p1:Question.d8p1:Title: Has UBO identity been independently verified?
